---
title: "About"
description: "About Jinu's Cloud Seeding Blog"
lang: en
page-layout: article
---

## What does this site document?

Jinu's Cloud Seeding Blog is an open research notebook for learning and designing cloud-seeding research. It connects particle-based cloud microphysics with PySDM, mesoscale weather simulations with WRF, and reviews of the relevant literature in one research workflow.

Rather than presenting only finished conclusions, it records:

- the physical question that started each experiment,
- the assumptions and settings used,
- how the code and results can be reproduced, and
- what was learned when results differed from expectations.

## How the notes are organized

**PySDM** covers particle-based microphysics and experiments, **WRF** covers weather fields and case simulations, and **Article Review** examines research questions and methods. Papers and software are linked through citations, while experimental code points to fixed versions in a separate repository.

## Links

- [GitHub · Jinu219](https://github.com/Jinu219)
- [Official PySDM repository](https://github.com/open-atmos/PySDM)
- [Official PySDM documentation](https://open-atmos.github.io/PySDM/)
